task_completion.description: The agent opened and read the dungeon design specification file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'dungeon_design_spec.txt'.

task_completion.description: The agent created a diagram with the six required rooms labeled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A draw.io (or similar diagramming tool) canvas showing shapes labeled with the room names: ENTRY HALL, GRAND HALL, ARMORY, SHRINE, TREASURE VAULT, and BOSS CHAMBER.

task_completion.description: The agent connected the rooms according to the specification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lines or arrows connecting the room shapes in the diagram (e.g., ENTRY HALL connected to GRAND HALL, GRAND HALL connected to ARMORY, SHRINE, and BOSS CHAMBER, etc.).

task_completion.description: The agent added the required markers to the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text labels or icons within or next to the rooms indicating 'Start', 'Rusty Key', 'Trap', 'Loot', 'Boss', and 'Locked Door'.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the diagram as a .drawio file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The diagramming tool's interface showing the filename 'sunken_crypt.drawio' in the title bar, or a file manager showing the saved file on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: The agent exported the diagram as a PNG image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog showing the '.png' format being saved, or a file manager/image viewer showing 'sunken_crypt.png' on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent used a genuine diagramming application (like draw.io) to create the layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the draw.io GUI with the diagram being actively edited, rather than just a text editor modifying XML.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's export functionality to create the PNG.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export dialog or menu in the diagramming tool being used, rather than the agent just renaming a file extension in the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the task by simply using 'touch' to create empty files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal commands like 'touch sunken_crypt.drawio' or 'touch sunken_crypt.png' without actual content generation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dungeon design specification is located at /home/ga/Desktop/dungeon_design_spec.txt. The diagram must include six specific rooms: ENTRY HALL, GRAND HALL, ARMORY, SHRINE, TREASURE VAULT, and BOSS CHAMBER. The rooms must be connected as follows: ENTRY HALL to GRAND HALL, GRAND HALL to ARMORY, GRAND HALL to SHRINE, GRAND HALL to BOSS CHAMBER, and SHRINE to TREASURE VAULT. The diagram must include markers for 'Start', 'Rusty Key', 'Trap', 'Loot', 'Boss', and 'Locked Door'. The final outputs must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/sunken_crypt.drawio and /home/ga/Desktop/sunken_crypt.png.
